ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code of the customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's address */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the customer */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_status" TEXT /* Loyalty program status of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who handled the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email, in-person visit) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the interaction */,
  "interaction_method" TEXT /* Method of interaction (e.g., phone, email, in-person) */,
  "interaction_result" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction (e.g., successful, unsuccessful, follow-up required) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated order */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, refund, exchange) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, successful, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method chosen by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in an order */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price for the item (quantity * unit price) */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_description_short" TEXT /* Short description of the product */,
  "product_description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_category_id" TEXT /* ID of the product category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign and its goals */,
  "campaign_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost of the campaign */,
  "campaign_roi" TEXT /* Return on investment (ROI) of the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)
